name: Chocolate Spritz Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a baking sheet with cooking spray.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine margarine, sugar, egg white, chocolate, and vanilla.
4. In another mixing bowl, combine flour and salt.
5. Mix wet ingredients with dry ingredients just until moistened.
6. Spoon dough into cookie press fitted with template of desired shape.
7. Press cookies 2 inches apart onto prepared baking sheet.
8. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until firm.
